overview: AI Sudo is a human-in-the-loop AI governance dashboard that intercepts commands from AI agents, classifies them by risk level (GREEN/YELLOW/RED), and routes critical actions to human operators for approval before execution. It provides a real-time approval queue, full audit logs, and system analytics — giving teams complete visibility and control over what AI agents do.
features: Real-time approval queue for high-risk AI agent commands
Risk classification engine: GREEN (auto-execute), YELLOW (warning), RED (requires approval)
Pattern detection for dangerous commands, root paths, and destructive flags
Blast radius analysis — estimated impact before any RED command executes
Audit logs with filtering by status, risk level, agent, and date
Analytics dashboard: total commands, blocked actions, disasters prevented
System health metrics: active agents, requests per minute
Role-based access for Admin and Reviewer operators via Internet Identity
REST API gateway: POST /intercept for agents, POST /approve for decisions
Real-time polling updates on the approval panel
